successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official University of Rochester News Center and Rochester Review alumni stories, prioritizing person-specific profiles with explicit class-year evidence in page titles or article text and substantive post-graduation impact.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official University of Rochester stories on rochester.edu/newscenter.

items.name: Greg Jorgensen
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Simon School alumnus Greg Jorgensen ’00S (MBA) navigates risk, rapid change, and relationships in the automotive industry as CFO of Ford Motor Company.
items.description: Ford Motor Company CFO and Simon Business School alumnus.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester News Center alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the excerpt and person-specific career summary.

items.name: Harriet Washington
items.bio: The University of Rochester says historian Harriet Washington ’76 discovered her passion for reading between the lines in the URochester library archives and built a career reopening the medical historical record.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester News Center story with explicit class-year evidence in the excerpt and article body.

items.name: Sylvia Owusu-Ansah
items.bio: The University of Rochester says alumna Sylvia Owusu-Ansah ’00 shapes medical storytelling on HBO Max’s The Pitt and made sure the story of Pittsburgh’s pioneering Freedom House paramedics reached the screen.
items.description: Emergency physician and medical advisor for HBO Max’s The Pitt.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester News Center story with explicit class-year evidence in the excerpt and article body.

items.name: Curtis Stewart
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Curtis Stewart ’08, ’08E earned degrees in mathematics and violin performance and has gone on to rack up multiple Grammy nominations.
items.description: Grammy-nominated violinist, composer, and dual-degree alumnus.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Rochester Review story on the University News Center with explicit class-year evidence in the title and article body plus a substantive achievement summary.

items.name: Heather Higginbottom
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Heather Higginbottom ’94 moved from Capitol Hill to JPMorgan Chase in a career shaped by Rochester and driven by public service.
items.description: Public-service leader and corporate executive at JPMorgan Chase.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive official career summary in the excerpt.

items.name: Nathan Gibbons
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Nathan Gibbons ’06, ’13S (MBA) turned perseverance into a career as a fintech cofounder and business leader.
items.description: Fintech cofounder and Simon Business School alumnus.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the title and person-specific career summary in the excerpt.

items.name: Tommy Evans
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Tommy Evans ’99 became one of NPR’s top editors and credits his Rochester education with preparing him for an unexpected journalism career.
items.description: Senior NPR editor and journalism leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive official summary in the excerpt.

items.name: Eric Wagner
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Eric Wagner ’97, a first-generation student who became a faculty member, built the foundation for his RNA-focused scientific work during his undergraduate years.
items.description: RNA scientist, faculty member, and first-generation alumnus.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a substantive official summary in the excerpt.

items.name: Amanda Stent
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Amanda Stent ’01 (PhD) leads AI strategy and research in Bloomberg’s Office of the CTO while helping shape the future of artificial intelligence in industry and academia.
items.description: AI strategy and research leader at Bloomberg.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester News Center story with explicit class-year evidence in the article body and a substantive career summary in the excerpt.

items.name: Sarah Bjornland
items.bio: The University of Rochester says Sarah Bjornland ’17 used meaningful connections with faculty and industry experts to find her niche and build a career in optics management.
items.description: Optics alumna working at the intersection of technology and management.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official University of Rochester alumni story with explicit class-year evidence in the title and a person-specific career summary in the excerpt and article body.

override_warnings: University of Rochester alumni depth was manually improved because generic alumni coverage was shallow.
This override uses official University of Rochester News Center and Rochester Review stories with explicit class-year evidence where available.
